message:
test(terminal): restore SGR bg color fixtures and optimize plasma sin_cos

differential_terminal.rs: Re-add 13 SGR background color test fixtures
covering ECH, EL, ED, ICH, DCH, IL, DL, SU, SD operations with active
background color attributes. These verify that terminal erase/scroll ops
correctly propagate the current bg color into newly created cells.

plasma.rs: Eliminate redundant sin_cos(time * 1.0) call by reusing the
already-computed sin_t1/cos_t1 values since time * 1.0 == time. Saves
one transcendental function pair per frame with identical output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
